name: Idesia
description: Idesia is a real estate developer committed to providing affordable dream homes. With their 'Ideal Way of Living' philosophy, they focus on creating communities that offer value, quality, and accessibility to Filipino homebuyers.

name: Avida Land
description: Avida Land is a premier real estate developer known for thoughtfully designed condominium units and residential developments across the Philippines. Part of the AyalaLand group, they focus on creating communities that enhance lifestyle.

name: demeterland
description: DEMETERLAND AND DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION does General Contracting, Construction Management and Design/Build. It is currently among the top and well-known general contractors operating in the province of Batangas.

name: Axeia Development Corporation
description: Axeia Development Corporation is a leading real estate developer specializing in residential and commercial properties. They are committed to delivering quality developments that meet the needs of modern Filipino families.

name: Apechomes
description: Apechomes is a dynamic real estate developer focused on building quality homes and communities. With a tagline of 'Building Lives', they create residential developments that provide value and comfort to Filipino families.

name: CitihomesBuildersInc
description: Amaia Land is a trusted real estate developer offering a wide range of residential properties including house and lots, townhouses, and condominiums. They are known for their commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.
